title: The Enigmatic Disappearance of Ebenezer Sibly

scenes.text: A respected doctor vanished without a clue in 1799.
It happened in London, England in 1799.
Ebenezer Sibly, a prominent physician, mysteriously disappeared one night.
To this day, his fate remains unknown.
scenes.label: UNSOLVED MYSTERY

scenes.text: Follow if you'd have cracked this one.

description: 📍 London, UK - 1799. Dr. Ebenezer Sibly, a well-respected physician, vanished without a trace. The mystery of his disappearance remains unsolved to this day. Follow for daily cold cases!
